title: LIPA School (Liverpool): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: LIPA School  URN: 141103  Notice issued to: The LIPA Multi Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘Special Measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Liverpool City Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
